source: U.S. Census Bureau ACS 5-year and TIGERweb

metrics.childPoverty: B17001 child below-poverty cells / B01001 under age 18 cells
metrics.rentBurden: B25070 gross rent 30%+ of income cells / B25070_001E
metrics.compositePovertyChildren: Composite score: poverty, children, child poverty
metrics.compositePovertyNoVehicle: Composite score: poverty and no-vehicle households
metrics.compositeSeniorAccess: Composite score: age 65+ and no-vehicle households
metrics.compositeHousingPressure: Composite score: rent burden, poverty, and SNAP households
metrics.compositeDigitalAccess: Composite score: no internet access and poverty
metrics.compositeLanguagePoverty: Composite score: limited-English households and poverty
